project.description: The project ID where service accounts are created.
project.rationale: Identifier only and does not affect security directly

action.description: The action to be performed in the default service accounts. Valid values are: DEPRIVILEGE, DELETE, DISABLE. Note that DEPRIVILEGE action will ignore the REVERT configuration in the restore_policy
action.rationale: DELETE permanently removes default service accounts and may disrupt Google Cloud services.  Instead, DEPRIVILEGE reduces permissions, which is safer

restore_policy.description: Action to perform on destroy. Valid values are NONE, REVERT, REVERT_AND_IGNORE_FAILURE
restore_policy.rationale: Using REVERT_AND_IGNORE_FAILURE prevents error handling and can hide failed restores.  REVERT or NONE are safer choices
